footer.description: A Culinary Journey Through the Flavors of India and the Himalayas. Experience authentic spices and traditional cooking in an elegant setting.
footer.newsletterThanks: Thank you for subscribing to our newsletter.

hero.subtitle: Authentic Indian & Nepali Cuisine
hero.tagline: A Culinary Journey Through the Flavors of India and the Himalayas

about.title: A Heritage of Spices & Tradition
about.paragraph1: At Doaba, we bring the rich, vibrant flavors of India and the majestic culinary traditions of the Himalayas straight to your table. Our journey began with a simple desire: to share the authentic taste of our homeland.
about.paragraph2: Every dish is a celebration of our heritage, crafted using traditional cooking methods and the finest, hand-selected spices. From the fiery tandoors of Punjab to the delicate momos of Nepal, we invite you to experience a symphony of flavors in an elegant, modern setting.

butterChicken.name: Butter Chicken
butterChicken.description: Tender chicken simmered in a rich, creamy tomato gravy with aromatic spices.

momo.name: Momo
momo.description: Steamed dumplings filled with spiced minced meat, served with a fiery tomato chutney.

samosa.name: Samosa
samosa.description: Crispy pastry filled with spiced potatoes and peas, served with tangy tamarind chutney.

paneerTikka.name: Paneer Tikka
paneerTikka.description: Cubes of cottage cheese marinated in yogurt and spices, grilled with bell peppers and onions.

dalMakhani.name: Dal Makhani
dalMakhani.description: Slow-cooked black lentils and kidney beans, enriched with butter and cream.

first.text: The best Indian and Nepali food experience in the city. The Butter Chicken is simply divine, and the ambiance is breathtaking.
first.author: Sarah Jenkins

second.text: An absolute gem! The Himalayan Momos transported me straight to Nepal. Exceptional service and a truly luxurious dining experience.
second.author: Michael Chen

third.text: Every dish is a masterpiece. The attention to detail in both the food presentation and the restaurant decor is unmatched.
third.author: Elena Rodriguez

reservation.title: Reserve a Table
reservation.successMessage: Thank you for choosing Doaba. We have received your request and will contact you shortly to confirm your booking.
